title: juniperus foetidissima f. squarrosa
intro: Juniperus foetidissima f. squarrosa, also known as the squarrose Mexican juniper, is a variant of the Mexican juniper plant that belongs to the cypress family (Cupressaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Juniperus foetidissima f. squarrosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including colds, flu, and digestive problems.
